title: MTG Card Search
description: Search MTG cards faster with Spellvault.

hero.title: MTG Card Search
hero.description: Search your Magic cards faster and find what matters without digging through binders.

sections.title: A better MTG card search
sections.description: Spellvault helps you move from vague inventory to fast, useful card lookup.

items.title: Search by card
items.description: Find cards by name without digging through folders manually.

items.title: Search by context
items.description: Use filters like set, tag, or location when you need more precision.

items.title: Find cards faster
items.description: Turn your collection into something you can actually navigate.

sections.title: Search that works in real collections
sections.description: Useful card search is more than a name lookup. Spellvault helps when collections are spread across decks, boxes, folders, and duplicates.

items.title: Search beyond the obvious
items.description: Look up cards with more context than memory alone, especially once the collection gets larger.

items.title: Use structure as part of search
items.description: Combine folders, tags, sets, and locations so you can find the exact copy you need.

items.title: Turn search into action
items.description: Once you find a card, keep moving into pricing, organization, or deck-building decisions.

sections.title: Search your MTG collection with less friction
sections.description: Spellvault gives you faster card lookup inside a cleaner inventory.

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Short answers about Spellvault as an MTG card search tool.

items.title: What is MTG card search?
items.description: MTG card search helps you find cards faster inside your collection instead of relying on memory or manual browsing.

items.title: Can I search by more than card name?
items.description: Yes. Search becomes much more useful when you can combine it with structure, tags, and collection context.

items.title: Why use Spellvault for card search?
items.description: Spellvault gives you card search inside the same place where you scan, organize, and track your collection.

items.title: Is this useful for larger collections?
items.description: Yes. Search becomes more valuable as your collection grows and memory stops being enough.
